revision.comment: Auto-generated page
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Valid SVG]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: per edit request on talk page - bypass redirect per [[WP:NOTBROKEN]]
revision.text:
[[File:W3C® Icon.svg|32px|alt=W3C|link=https://validator.w3.org/nu/]]✓ The source code of this [[SVG]] is [https://validator.w3.org/nu/{{#ifexist:File:{{PAGENAME}}|?doc=https:{{urlencode:{{filepath:{{#titleparts:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}} valid].

{{file other|{{{category|[[Category:Wikipedia images in SVG format]]}}}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing programmatically generated pages
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Valid SVG]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Valid SVG]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Valid SVG]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] to [[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace {{subst:NAMESPACE}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Valid SVG]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace Template]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]

revision.comment: tagging these as blank templates
revision.text: #[[en:Template:Valid SVG]] [[Category:Pages with blank templates]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude> [[Category:Pages with blank templates]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude>[[Category:Pages with blank templates]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude> [[Category:Pages with blank templates]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:qq-{{subst:NAMESPACE}}]]<noinclude>[[Category:Pages tagged as templates in userspace {{subst:NAMESPACE}}]]</noinclude>[[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #[[en:Template:Valid SVG]] [[Category:Pages with blank templates]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude> [[Category:Pages with blank templates]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude>[[Category:Pages with blank templates]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude> [[Category:Pages with blank templates]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]] [[Category:qq-Template]]<noinclude>[[Category:Pages tagged as templates in userspace Template]]</noinclude>[[Category:qq]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Qq-Template]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #[[en:Template:Valid SVG]] [[Category:Pages with blank templates]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude> [[Category:Pages with blank templates]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude>[[Category:Pages with blank templates]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude> [[Category:Pages with blank templates]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]] <noinclude>[[Category:Pages tagged as templates in userspace Template]]</noinclude>[[Category:qq]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
revision.text: #[[en:Template:Valid SVG]] [[Category:Pages with blank templates]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude> [[Category:Pages with blank templates]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude>[[Category:Pages with blank templates]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude> [[Category:Pages with blank templates]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]] <noinclude>[[Category:Pages tagged as templates in userspace Template]]</noinclude>[[Category:11]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Category:Pages with blank templates" to "Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}"
revision.text: #[[en:Template:Valid SVG]] [[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Valid SVG]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude> [[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Valid SVG]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Valid SVG]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude> [[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Valid SVG]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]] <noinclude>[[Category:Pages tagged as templates in userspace Template]]</noinclude>[[Category:11]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:11]]" to ""
revision.text: #[[en:Template:Valid SVG]] [[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Valid SVG]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude> [[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Valid SVG]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Valid SVG]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude> [[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Valid SVG]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]] <noinclude>[[Category:Pages tagged as templates in userspace Template]]</noinclude> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Blank templates
revision.text: #[[en:Template:Valid SVG]] [[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Valid SVG]]<noinclude>[[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude> [[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Valid SVG]]<noinclude>[[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Valid SVG]]<noinclude>[[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude> [[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Valid SVG]]<noinclude>[[Category:refreshing s 1-26]] <noinclude>[[Category:Pages tagged as templates in userspace Template]]</noinclude> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Erroneous transclusions of Valid SVG
revision.text: #[[en:Template:Valid SVG]] <noinclude>[[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude><noinclude>[[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:refreshing s 1-26]] <noinclude>[[Category:Pages tagged as templates in userspace Template]]</noinclude> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Pages tagged as templates in userspace Template
revision.text: #[[en:Template:Valid SVG]] <noinclude>[[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude><noinclude>[[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:refreshing s 1-26]] <noinclude></noinclude> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Refreshing s 1-26
revision.text: #[[en:Template:Valid SVG]] <noinclude></noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude><noinclude></noinclude> <noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude> </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q14451578)
revision.text: #[[en:Template:Valid SVG]] <noinclude></noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude><noinclude></noinclude> <noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude> </noinclude> <noinclude>{{wikidata link|Q14451578}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: #[[en:Template:Valid SVG]] <noinclude></noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude><noinclude></noinclude> <noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude> </noinclude> <noinclude>{{wikidata link|Q14451578}}</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23692667944|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: #[[en:Template:Valid SVG]] <noinclude></noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude><noinclude></noinclude> <noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude> </noinclude> <noinclude>{{wikidata link|Q14451578}}</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: #[[en:Template:Valid SVG]] <noinclude></noinclude><noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude> {{wikidata link|Q14451578}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
